event.intent: Encode Guru's STEPPPS semantics: Script acts on dimensions, Pixel carries display logic, Prompt carries next GenAI prompt.

pixel.display_logic: Render this development action as an inspectable JSON record with STEPPPS dimensions visible.

prompt.text: STEPPPS - script will act on other STEPPS; Pixel will contain display logic; Prompt will have next GenAI prompt.
prompt.next_genai_prompt: Continue the next TBOS change by creating or updating a STEPPPS dev-action, then verify the dev chain.
